purpose: Authoritative and comparative sources required before implementing a cross-platform Chromium-family anti-detect runtime.

source_classes.name: BrowseForge main project
source_classes.role: Consumer contract, runtime registry, profile/session storage, REST/MCP/workflow/dashboard/Docker integration.

source_classes.name: CloakBrowser v146 source reference
source_classes.role: Chromium-family wrapper, launch flags, proxy/WebRTC policy, Playwright bind, Docker/browser packaging reference.

source_classes.name: Camoufox v135 source reference
source_classes.role: Firefox-family profile/fingerprint configuration reference and contrast model for deterministic persona generation.

source_classes.name: Chromium upstream source
source_classes.role: Final source of truth for Blink, GPU, WebRTC, network, storage, permissions, headless, and platform build behavior.
source_classes.blocking_reason: Exact Chromium base is selected, but Chromium source has not been downloaded or indexed because it is a large external checkout.

source_classes.name: Detector reports and sanitized runtime traces
source_classes.role: Runtime-specific proof that surfaces match intended fingerprints under real detector pages.
source_classes.blocking_reason: No runtime-specific detector runs exist yet.
